elements.name: Title
texts: Cardinal Michael Logue boards a boat at the Station Island ferry house, 1913

elements.name: Description
texts: The Cardinal's delegation board a boat to Station Island, surrounded by crowd

elements.name: Rights
texts: Image Courtesy of the National Library of Ireland

elements.name: Abstract
texts: Robert French was the chief photographer responsible for photographing three quarters of the Lawrence Collection. For more information, see the Dictionary of Irish Biography: http://dib.cambridge.org/viewReadPage.do?articleId=a3369
